description: A plain, candid intake/booking-style photograph of an older man (per the tweet, Vietnamese national Long Than Lam) shown from the chest up against a plain gray wall, with a gray locker or cabinet edge visible at left. He has graying short hair and a gray mustache and wears a dark navy hooded sweatshirt printed with the words 'Football MOM' in light blue glittery script. The shot is a frontal, evenly lit custody photo with no designed overlay, slogan, agency seal or graphic layout—so it is not a designed meme/graphic; it functions as a straightforward mugshot-style document image. The accompanying ICE tweet supplies the framing, listing alleged convictions (attempted murder, assault with a deadly weapon, firing at an inhabited dwelling) and stating he faces deportation. Marked is_designed=false (candid/booking photo).
notable_text: Football MOM (text printed on the subject's sweatshirt; no agency-added overlay text)
